title: Fatal House Fire Claims Two Lives in Rowan County
summary: A late-night house fire on Saw Road in Rowan County resulted in the death of two individuals. Crews responded to the scene just before midnight Sunday.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the critical need for fire safety and emergency response preparedness in residential areas.

title: Man Charged in South Charlotte Strip Club Shooting
summary: A 22-year-old man is facing charges for allegedly shooting another person at Club Onyx early Sunday morning, according to police reports.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about violence and safety in entertainment venues and the broader community.

title: UNC Charlotte Adjusts Housing Policy to Meet Federal Guidance
summary: UNC Charlotte is ending gender-affirming housing to comply with federal guidelines, while affirming its commitment to supporting all students.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the impact of federal policies on university practices and student support systems.

title: Police Investigate Road Rage Incident Involving Impersonation of Officer
summary: A driver is accused of impersonating a police officer using blue lights during a road rage incident, leading to a police investigation.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and the potential for misuse of authority on roadways.

title: Arson Investigation Launched After Apartment Fire in North Charlotte
summary: Police are investigating a weekend apartment fire in north Charlotte as arson, with heavy smoke damage reported in four units.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the severity of arson and its impact on residential communities and property safety.

title: Elementary Teacher Arrested for Assaulting Student in Catawba County
summary: Christina McCarthy, a 42-year-old elementary teacher, was arrested for allegedly pulling and jerking a student's arm, according to an arrest warrant.
charlotte_impact: Highlights concerns about student safety and professional conduct within the education system.

title: Heat Wave Expected to Hit the Region by the Weekend
summary: The weather forecast predicts dry and mild conditions this week, followed by a heat wave as the weekend approaches.
charlotte_impact: Alerts residents to prepare for extreme weather conditions and take necessary precautions.

title: North Carolina Resident Confirmed Onboard Cruise Ship with Hantavirus Outbreak
summary: The NC Department of Health and Human Services is monitoring a hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship, with one NC resident confirmed onboard.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of public health monitoring and response to potential disease outbreaks.

title: Rock Hill Public Transportation to Introduce Fares
summary: Rock Hill My Ride passengers may soon have to pay $2.50 for public transportation, a change from the previous no-cost service.
charlotte_impact: Indicates changes in public transportation funding and accessibility for local residents.

title: Novant Health Seeks Approval for Emergency Department in SouthPark
summary: Novant Health is seeking approval for a $21.3 million freestanding emergency department in SouthPark, with completion expected in January 2029.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing investment and expansion of healthcare services in the region.

title: Experts Say New Grads Should Worry About Experience, Not AI
summary: Economists suggest that new job seekers should focus on gaining experience rather than fearing AI taking entry-level positions.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights into the evolving job market and the skills needed for young professionals.

title: Child Injured in Hit-and-Run Near Quail Hollow Middle School
summary: An 8-year-old child suffered serious injuries after being involved in a hit-and-run incident near Quail Hollow Middle School on Saturday.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the need for increased traffic safety and awareness around school zones.

title: Former Mayor Offers to Serve as Interim Mayor
summary: Jennifer Roberts, former Charlotte mayor, has offered to serve as an unpaid interim mayor, pledging not to seek another term in 2027.
charlotte_impact: Highlights potential transitions in local government leadership and civic engagement.

title: Gynecologist Accused of Sexual Assault During Exam
summary: A Gaston County gynecologist is facing a lawsuit alleging sexual assault during a routine examination.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious concerns about patient safety and professional ethics in the medical field.

title: Fire Breaks Out at Davidson College Fraternity House
summary: A fire at Davidson College's Kappa Sigma fraternity house prompted a multi-department response early Sunday. No injuries were reported.
charlotte_impact: Addresses safety concerns on college campuses and the importance of fire safety measures.
